generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for capturing point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for capturing depth information"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth information from Intel Deepsense D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANClusteredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data from DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated by Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking based on clustered point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and AI capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for implementing models and scripts"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, DrivingPathVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system processing to cloud environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadedInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management via UI for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Storage of vehicle state and object track data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and state"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance ComputationOffloadedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC system processing offloaded to cloud environment"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of vehicle data for historical analysis"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle direction control"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing autonomy tasks"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance JetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for communication"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, MotorActuation, SteeringServoActuation, JetsonOrinNano, VedderElectronicSpeedController, JetsonNXAntenna
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands including desired speed adjustments, emergency braking signals, and enable/disable commands from the digital twin to the physical vehicle's actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system comprising Physical Twin Entity (sensor/actuator interfaces), Digital Twin Entity (data processing/control), User Entity (visualization/control UI), and Data Translation FE, implemented as ROS2 packages communicating via ROS2 network and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation for ADAS development) and operation phase (optimization and health monitoring during vehicle use), covering both as-designed and as-operated representations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-entity communication via ROS2 network; inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi with ≤100 ms latency requirement per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted in cloud infrastructure for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework; ACC implementation compliant with ISO 15622."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system design with compliance to ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in document."
]
